highlights.description: Universal deployment tool for container applications with declarative YAML configuration
AWS LightSail container service support with Pulumi IaC backend
ECR repository management with build and push workflow

added.description: Core interfaces and configuration schema for deployment targets, backends, and runtimes
AWS LightSail container service target with automatic container definition generation
Pulumi IaC backend for infrastructure state management
OmniAgent and generic container runtime adapters
`bootstrap` command for AWS IAM setup with required permissions
`ecr` command group for ECR repository management (`create`, `list`, `delete`, `login`)
`ecr push` command for building and pushing Docker images to ECR
Example deployment configurations for OmniAgent and generic containers

fixed.description: Change default AWS region to us-west-2

documentation.description: README with usage guide and configuration reference
MkDocs documentation site with PlexusOne design system theme
AWS setup guide with IAM permissions reference
README shields for build status and license
Adopt PlexusOne unified navigation and theme

dependencies.description: Add go.mod with Pulumi SDK v3 and Cobra dependencies

infrastructure.description: Add GitHub Actions shared workflows for CI

internal.description: Align struct field formatting in LightSail target
